Intel Stock Is Where It Was 27 Years Ago: How The World's Leading Chipmaker Lost The Plot, Thrice
data.description: Intel Corp. (NASDAQ: INTC) stock has plummeted by over 56% YTD due to losing ground in chip market to rivals like AMD, Nvidia, Qualcomm.

Trump Voters' Trust in Election Process Soars In Sharp Reversal To Post-2020 Feelings
data.description: Donald Trump voters, along with the broader electorate, expressed overwhelming confidence in the 2024 election process, a striking contrast to the skepticism that marked the 2020 presidential race.
